readiness.api_block_reason: Phase 0 inventory cannot authorize model execution; visible-tool baseline gate has not been built.
readiness.next_step: If Phase 1 count gate passes, curate a separate evaluator/model-visible manifest without API. If it fails, add new realistic agent-like candidates or validate pending sources before any LLM run.
